faqs.question: What is the best analytics & data software for product teams?
faqs.answer: Based on our evaluation, the recommended analytics & data platforms for product teams include Google Analytics, Mixpanel, Matomo, FullStory. Each offers different strengths for product teams requirements.

faqs.question: How much should product teams teams spend on analytics & data software?
faqs.answer: product teams teams typically spend $10-200 per user per month on analytics & data software, depending on feature requirements and team size.

faqs.question: What features matter most for product teams?
faqs.answer: Key features for product teams teams include core analytics & data functionality, integration capabilities, mobile access, and scalable pricing.
